title: CraftNotch
description: A mod/plugin to recraft Notch Apple
body:
# 🍎 CraftNotch

Bring back the classic way to craft the Enchanted Golden Apple in Minecraft!

## ✨ Features
- Restores the original crafting recipe for the **Enchanted Golden Apple** (Notch Apple)
- Simple and lightweight plugin
- Works on modern Minecraft versions (1.20+)
- No config required – plug and play

## 🛠️ Crafting Recipe
```
GGG
GAG
GGG
```

- `G` = Gold Block
- `A` = Apple

## 📦 Installation
1. Download the latest `.jar` file
2. Place it in your server's `/plugins` folder
3. Restart your server

## ⚙️ Requirements
- Java 17 or higher
- Fabric (1.21.8-1.21.11)
- NeoForge (1.21.8-26.1.X)
- QuiltMC (1.21.8-1.21.11)
- Spigot / Paper server (1.20+)

## ❓ Why this plugin?
The Enchanted Golden Apple recipe was removed from vanilla Minecraft. This plugin brings it back for servers that want a more classic or overpowered survival experience.

## 🔒 Compatibility
- ✔ Spigot
- ✔ Paper
- ✔ Purpur
- ✔ NeoForge
- ✔ Fabric
- ✔ QuiltMC

---

## ❤️ Support
If you like the plugin, consider giving it a ⭐ on Modrinth!
